alerts.title: Iran enrichment reaches 60% U-235; breakout timeline 1-2 weeks
alerts.summary: Iran's uranium enrichment level has reached 60% U-235 with estimated nuclear breakout time of 1-2 weeks, per global_metrics. Multiple headlines confirm US concern over uranium transfers to undisclosed sites. This represents a material shortening of breakout capability amid active Persian Gulf hostilities.

alerts.title: Shahed-136 drone confirmed striking Kuwait International Airport Terminal 1
alerts.summary: CCTV footage confirms Iranian Shahed-136 drone struck Terminal 1 of Kuwait International Airport on June 3, with 1 killed and 63 wounded reported. Multiple Telegram sources (ME Spectator, ~44K-54K views) and incidents feed (Guardian, Jerusalem Post) corroborate the strike. This represents continued kinetic escalation despite ceasefire talks.

alerts.title: USS Florida submarine positioned in Persian Gulf amid active escalation
alerts.summary: USS Florida submarine deployed to Persian Gulf (lat 25.67, lon 51.55) per assets feed. Positioning coincides with active US-Iran kinetic exchange, including reported Hellfire strikes on Iranian-bound tankers and US strikes on Iranian radar sites in the region.

alerts.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire violations continue; 9 killed in strikes near Beirut
alerts.summary: Despite ceasefire agreement announced June 3, Israeli drone and airstrike operations continue in southern Lebanon and near Beirut outskirts (lat 33.66-33.97, lon 35.5-36.08). Nine confirmed deaths reported, including paramedic. Multiple sources (Al Jazeera, AzerNews, Hasht-e Subh Daily) document ceasefire violations and Israeli military preparations for expanded strikes.

alerts.title: US sentiment stabilizes on Iran conflict amid Trump restraint signals
alerts.summary: US sentiment analysis shows 48% positive vs 43% negative (improved from 45% negative in prior cycle), with 'trump' remaining dominant (75 mentions vs 88 prior). Congressional war powers resolution passed, and reporting indicates Trump policy stance constrains escalation unless US troops killed. Sentiment shift reflects mixed public posture: active kinetic ops paired with rhetorical de-escalation.

analysis_note: The conflict theater exhibits acute nuclear and kinetic tension: Iran approaches 1-2 week nuclear breakout window while simultaneously executing confirmed drone and missile strikes on Gulf infrastructure, forcing US and regional military responses. Parallel Israel-Lebanon ceasefire is collapsing under continued IDF operations. Trump administration signals restraint but maintains active military posture, creating strategic ambiguity that prolongs high-threat equilibrium.
